company_name: # company_name       REQUIRED — Prospect or existing client company name
# channel            REQUIRED — Lead source: Foodics | EmployeeReferral | CustomerReferral | PartnerReferral | Website | AmbassadorReferral | DirectSales | Sonic | Historical
# country                     — One of: Egypt | KSA | UAE | Bahrain | Jordan  (leave blank if unknown)
# estimated_value             — Estimated monthly MRR in local currency
# package_interest            — One of: Essential | Operations | Enterprise
# stage                       — One of: Lead | Qualified | ClosedWon | ClosedLost  (default: Lead)
# owner_email        REQUIRED — Email address of the CRM user who owns this lead
#                               Must match an existing user in Settings → Team.
# opportunity_type            — One of: New | Renewal | Upsell | Expansion (default: New)
# notes                       — Any free-text notes about the lead
# account_name                — If this lead is linked to an existing account
#                               exactly as it appears in accounts.csv. Leave blank for new prospects.
